about.title: About AI Flux
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Source for Curated AI Intelligence

hero.heading: AI Consulting & Intelligence, Aggregated
hero.description: AI Flux delivers cutting-edge technology intelligence through professional curation, precise translation, and real-time aggregation — empowering decision-makers with actionable insights.

sections.title: AI Consulting
points: Strategic advisory on AI adoption and roadmap planning
Technical feasibility assessment and proof-of-concept guidance
Custom solution design tailored to enterprise needs

sections.title: Intelligent Aggregation
points: Multi-source intelligence gathering from global tech outlets

sections.title: Professional Excellence
points: Wall Street Journal standard editorial curation
Expert human review against superficial machine output
Bilingual proficiency — English sourcing meets native Chinese readability

sections.title: Uncompromising Accuracy
points: Correction and retraction policy with full accountability

sections.title: Timely Delivery
points: Real-time news feed with sub-hour refresh cycles
Breaking-story flash alerts on critical developments

values.text: Independence — editorial decisions free from commercial influence
Integrity — every piece of information is traceable to its origin
Velocity — speed without sacrificing depth or rigor

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.description: Have a question, suggestion, or collaboration idea? Reach out through any of the channels below.
contact.response_note: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
